title.zh: 食品廠智能秤倉儲項目
title.en: Food Factory Smart Scale Warehouse Project

system_used.zh: 智能倉儲稱重管理系統

background.zh: 該食品廠日均處理 200+ 批次原料與成品，原本以人工記錄搭配傳統設備作業，資料需要二次輸入，效率低且容易出錯，因此導入智能秤與倉儲稱重系統。
background.en: The food factory processes over 200 batches of ingredients and finished goods daily. Its previous manual process with traditional equipment required duplicate data entry, so it deployed smart scales and a warehouse weighing system.

pain_points.zh: 手寫記錄容易出錯，資料難以辨識
pain_points.en: Manual records caused frequent errors and illegibility

pain_points.zh: 智能秤資料無法直接對接 ERP
pain_points.en: Smart-scale data could not flow directly into ERP

system.zh: 智能倉儲稱重管理系統

details.zh: 部署 5 台 XZ-3000 智能平台秤
對接客戶既有 ERP 系統
details.en: Integrated with the client’s ERP system

details.zh: 搭配標籤列印與掃描流程
details.en: Combined with label printing and scanning workflows

result_detail.zh: 導入智能秤與倉儲稱重系統後，稱重效率提升 40%，減少 2 名記錄人員，並讓所有稱重資料都能即時查詢與追溯。
result_detail.en: After introducing smart scales and the warehouse weighing system, efficiency increased by 40%, two recording roles were eliminated, and all weighing records became instantly searchable and traceable.
